name: premierpro-mcp-bridge-cep
description: CEP panel for PremierPro MCP - bridges WebSocket commands to ExtendScript inside Premiere Pro

scripts.enable-debug:mac: defaults write com.adobe.CSXS.11 PlayerDebugMode 1 && echo 'Debug mode enabled. Restart Premiere Pro.'
scripts.disable-debug:mac: defaults write com.adobe.CSXS.11 PlayerDebugMode 0 && echo 'Debug mode disabled.'
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run setup-csinterface && npm run enable-debug:mac && npm run link-panel:mac
